calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Canonical goal-stream landing validation
items.note: Validates that the StepHarness canonical path, not an experiment-local hook, calls update_schema_wanting before action selection and reproduces the V3-EXQ-559 full-arm heartbeat counters. Non-contributory diagnostic.
